---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new maintainer workflow, improvement, or capability
title: "[feature]: "
---

## Problem

What maintainer problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the workflow, output, or behavior you want.

## Why This Matters

How would this reduce maintainer load, review time, or contributor confusion?

## Suggested Inputs

What inputs should the feature use?

- issue payloads
- pull request metadata
- release ranges
- repository structure or setup files
- other

## Expected Output

What should the tool produce?

- labels
- structured JSON
- markdown comments
- release draft text
- contributor guidance
- other

## Additional Context

Include examples, prior art, or constraints that would help shape the proposal.
